title: Possibly lost spin off Eva Manga
display_title: Possibly lost spin off Eva Manga
wikitext:
[]: Possibly lost spin off Eva Manga             Quote Post by sdparchem » Mon Apr 13, 2020 6:56 am I swear I didn’t imagine this. I was on one of those old sites where you could read manga for free that was scanned in. The manga featured Shinji and Asuka on a depopulated earth after the events of EoE. Going about exploring, looking for other people, raising crops, etc... does anyone know the name? None of the Wikipedia article seem to mention anything like it. Thank you.

[]: Re: Possibly lost spin off Eva Manga             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon Apr 13, 2020 9:06 am That sounds like something fan-made to me

[]: Re: Possibly lost spin off Eva Manga             Quote Post by robersora » Mon Apr 13, 2020 10:18 am Sounds like Evangelion Re-Take. There is apparently a version with and without porn. People here seemed to like it very much, I've never read it though.

[]: Re: Possibly lost spin off Eva Manga             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Apr 13, 2020 12:39 pm While Re-Take has some epilogue material, it was mostly an in-series Peggy-Sue. I think this was most likely an American webcomic whose name currently escapes me; with lower probability, perhaps pengel's Happy End of Evangelion .

[]: Re: Possibly lost spin off Eva Manga             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sat Apr 18, 2020 2:49 pm Mr. Tines wrote: While Re-Take has some epilogue material, it was mostly an in-series Peggy-Sue. I think this was most likely an American webcomic whose name currently escapes me; with lower probability, perhaps pengel's Happy End of Evangelion .
